# Vex

**Summary**: An EOR method where solvent vapors are injected to reduce oil viscosity and improve mobility.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] evaluated the VAPEX process as an alternative to SAGD for heavy oil recovery.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] VAPEX is less energy intensive than SAGD but typically produces at lower rates.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] Simulated via reservoir models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- VAPEX showed good results in Case 1 of the optimization comparison. ([[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015, p. 17]])
- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] Good results in Case 1.
